name: stac
desc: Stac is a Server-Driven UI (SDUI) framework for Flutter, enabling you to create stunning, cross-platform applications dynamically with JSON. Build and update y…
descFull: Stac is a Server-Driven UI (SDUI) framework for Flutter, enabling you to create stunning, cross-platform applications dynamically with JSON. Build and update your app's UI in real-time with ease and flexibility!
